affirmations.text: I am worthy of love and respect.
Every day I am growing stronger and wiser.
I can handle whatever challenges come my way.
I attract positive and healthy relationships.
My body is healthy and full of energy.
I am capable of achieving my goals.
I deserve all the good things life has to offer.
**I embrace change** as a chance to learn and evolve.
I bounce back from setbacks stronger than before.
I communicate openly and honestly with loved ones.
I nourish my body with healthy choices.
Success flows to me effortlessly.
I am enough exactly as I am.
I am constantly improving in every area of my life.
Obstacles are just opportunities in disguise.
I am a good listener and a supportive friend.
I wake up feeling refreshed and energized.
I am *destined for great things*.
I accept myself completely.
My potential is limitless.
I never give up, no matter what.
People appreciate my company.
I am in tune with my body's needs.
I am a magnet for opportunities.
I try my best and that's enough.
I am open to learning new things.
I handle stress with grace and calm.
I value my relationships with others.
I take care of my physical wellbeing.
I work towards my dreams every single day.
